channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Governor Mbarire Seeks Justice After Police Clash Leaves Two Dead in Embu Protest
item.description: Embu County Governor Cecily Mbarire has called for an independent investigation after two young men were shot dead and another injured during demonstrations in Mbeere North over poor conditions at Ish...

item.title: Roelf Meyer Named South Africa’s Next Ambassador to the United States
item.description: South African President Cyril Ramaphosa has officially appointed Roelf Meyer as the new ambassador to the United States, filling the post that had been vacant since 2025. Meyer's appointment comes aft...

item.title: Gachagua Comments on ODM Leaders' Concerns About UDA Expansion in Nyanza
item.description: Former deputy president Rigathi Gachagua sparked fresh political debate after commenting on recent concerns raised by Orange Democratic Movement (ODM) leaders regarding the United Democratic Alliance'...

item.title: AA and BSM Driving Schools fined for illegal booking fees, refunds to be issued
item.description: The UK Competition and Markets Authority (CMA) has fined two driving schools, AA Driving School and BSM Driving School, a combined total of £4.2 million for engaging in illegal drip-pricing practices....

item.title: False AI-Edited Video Claims Saint Carlo Acutis Predicted ‘Three Days of Darkness’ in 2026
item.description: Rappler verified and debunked a video falsely claiming that Saint Carlo Acutis predicted ‘three days of darkness’ to happen in 2026. The video, which circulated widely on YouTube and other social medi...

item.title: Filmmakers Explore Social Media’s Exposure to Real Violence Through Horror Reboot
item.description: Director Daniel Goldhaber and co-writer Isa Mazzei have rebooted the infamous 1978 horror-exploitation film 'Faces of Death' to explore the modern implications of graphic content online. The original ...

item.title: Palace Says Barzaga’s Call to Oust Marcos Incites Sedition
item.description: Malacañang on Wednesday blasted Cavite Representative Kiko Barzaga for calling for the removal of President Ferdinand 'Bongbong' Marcos Jr., describing his statement as amounting to incitement to sedi...

item.title: A decade of loss: How B.C.’s toxic drug crisis continues to harm survivors and communities
item.description: Over the past decade, British Columbia has faced a relentless toxic drug crisis that has claimed thousands of lives and left countless others severely affected. The ongoing emergency, which began in 2...

item.title: Blue Jays Edge Brewers in Extra Innings After Late-Game Comeback
item.description: The Toronto Blue Jays rallied to defeat the Milwaukee Brewers 9-7 in a dramatic 10-inning game on Tuesday night, handing Milwaukee their sixth consecutive loss – their longest skid since June 2023. Th...

item.title: Experts warn proposed limits on nicotine replacement products may hinder smoking cessation in India
item.description: India’s drug advisory body has recommended tighter control on the over-the-counter sale of most nicotine replacement therapies, including nicotine gums and lozenges. The proposal would exempt only unf...

item.title: Federal Government Launches Subsidy Programme for Small Farmers Owning Under 12 Acres
item.description: ISLAMABAD: The federal government has rolled out a special subsidy programme aimed at small-scale farmers to ease the financial strain caused by the ongoing global energy crisis. This initiative targe...

item.title: Malindi: Suspect Arrested for Kidnapping Police Officer's Daughter, Victim Rescued Safely
item.description: In Malindi, Kilifi County, detectives from the Directorate of Criminal Investigations (DCI) successfully rescued a 17-year-old girl who had been abducted from her home. The girl, whose father serves a...

item.title: Ilse Klink on Why Theatre Remains Vital in the Age of AI
item.description: Veteran South African actor Ilse Klink emphasises the enduring significance of theatre amid the rise of artificial intelligence. Having worked on iconic shows like Isidingo, 7de Laan, Lockdown, and Pa...

item.title: Trump Rapidly Shifts Tone During Brief Sky News Interview
item.description: A brief and unusual interview with former U.S. President Donald Trump, conducted via phone call with Sky News, showcased a remarkable shift in his tone and opinions. Initially, Trump lavished praise o...

item.title: Vancouver Goldeneyes defeat Seattle Torrent 4-1 to stay in playoff contention
item.description: The Vancouver Goldeneyes kept their faint playoff hopes alive with a decisive 4-1 victory over the Seattle Torrent in a matchup between two expansion teams. Hannah Miller scored early in the second pe...

item.title: Queensland Translink head resigns amid departmental reshuffle and rail network scrutiny
item.description: Deborah Hume, who was appointed as deputy director-general of Queensland’s Translink division in 2025 after being recruited from New Zealand, has resigned from her role citing family reasons. Hume, wh...

item.title: RTI Intervenes to Remove 26 Overloaded Schoolchildren from Unsafe Minibus Taxi
item.description: On Monday, the No Nonsense Road Traffic Intervention Team (RTI) in Park Rynie intervened to protect the lives of 26 schoolchildren who were dangerously crammed into a minibus taxi designed for only 14...

item.title: Madhya Pradesh closely monitoring two candidates in Kerala and Tamil Nadu for Rajya Sabha election
item.description: The Rajya Sabha elections in India have drawn keen attention from Madhya Pradesh due to the political significance of two candidates contesting in Kerala and Tamil Nadu. Though the elections are geogr...

item.title: Kate Garraway Finds New Happiness with Journalist Liam Halligan After Losing Her Husband Derek Draper
item.description: Television presenter Kate Garraway, known for her work on Good Morning Britain and Smooth Radio, appears to have found love again two years after the death of her husband, Derek Draper. Draper passed ...

item.title: Iran’s Oil Exports and China’s Role Challenge Trump’s Hormuz Blockade
item.description: The article discusses how Iran appears to be gaining the upper hand in the ongoing oil standoff spurred by former US President Donald Trump’s blockade of the Strait of Hormuz. Javier Blas argues that ...
